sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55320" key="kata/strwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατά-στρωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spreading, laying</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρικλίνου</foreign> Aristeas <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">319</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
